results.claim: A firm growing ~12% organically could command an EBITDA multiple more than double that of a firm with no organic growth, and organic growth has surpassed M&A as the top priority for most advisory firms (per Cerulli, cited by Mercer Capital).
results.verified_figure: Organic growth has surpassed M&A as the top priority for a majority of advisory firms (Source: Cerulli). A firm growing 12% organically could have an EBITDA multiple over twice that of firms without any organic growth (Source: Mercer Capital).
results.notes: The 12% growth/EBITDA multiple figure is an analysis from Mercer Capital, whereas the priority shift is a finding from Cerulli.
